title: Availability
description: The persisted form of one cell of the availability matrix (design §7.8): a workflow version made available in a deployment environment. Availability is additive and many-to-many — a version may be available in many environments, and an environment may have many versions of one workflow available at once. The record is keyed by (baseWorkflowId, versionNumber, environment); its presence means available, and deleting it withdraws availability. Governed by the target environment's administrators and gated by readiness (a full source-credential set, §7.7) at the surface, not by the store. Backends store this document verbatim.

baseWorkflowId.description: The base workflow id the made-available version belongs to.

environment.description: The deployment environment the version is available in.

createdBy.description: The actor that made the version available.

createdAt.description: When the version was made available.
